page_metadata.biotools__summary: MitopatHs is a database that allows to navigate among the biochemical pathways (PatHs) of human (H) mitochondria (Mito). It is a logically-framed tool for visualizing multiple mitochondrial pathways.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MitopatHs is a database that allows to navigate among the biochemical pathways (PatHs) of human (H) mitochondria (Mito). It is a logically-framed tool for visualizing multiple mitochondrial pathways.
